target:
You're late~.
I was worried, you know!

Sorry.
I suddenly felt a stomachache…

See?
It's definitely the big one!!
(On Hitogashima Island, there's a belief in drifting gods, where deities reside in objects that drift in from the sea)
(They call her Hiruko-sama here, and she's considered the deity of fishing)
(That's why they collect drifting objects on the beach instead of throwing them away…)

(Twice a year, in summer and winter.
Through the "Umi-okuri" ceremony, they burn them and return the deity)
(Indeed, a lot of people have gathered. There are about a thousand in the shrine area)
It's been ages since we all watched the Umi-okuri together.

Ah… that's what it means…
Yes…

(Ushio…
I can't believe they've lost their shadow's memories…)
(If that guy's head gets fixed, it would be a relief…)
What? Where are Mio and Sou!?

Big brother…
He's planning to confess to Mio today.

He did confess twice before and got rejected, right?
That guy?

Yes…
He's trying for the third time…
But sometimes unscientific things do happen…

Because!
Mio has someone else she likes!
I'm sorry… I shouldn't have said that…!!

No, Mio!
I don't know if it's the right time to say this…
But…

But…
Since it's this time, let me say it.

I really like Mio!
So… that's why!
Mio… Please let me protect you!

Wait!!
Sou, hold on… What are you saying…?!

I'm happy about your feelings…
But I'm sorry. I want to be good friends with you, Sou!
(I told you not to come out! That idiot!!!)

Shinpei…
You were caught in a second…

Idiot…
You thought you could transform like that…

Wait, Shinpei!!
That… That can't be!

I'm sorry…
I couldn't help but look at everyone's faces…
Mio, did you dress her in a yukata Toki?
What are you doing, Shinpei!! Get away from that person quickly!!
I'm not letting go of this person.
Of course it's obvious. You can't switch with someone whose funeral's already over.
From the start, you didn't want to switch, did you?

Why aren't you listening?
You can't hear me…?
